title: AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4590 / 58 OG No. 15, 3099 (April 9, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3293, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT REAPPROPRIATING CERTAIN SUMS APPROPRIATED IN REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sums appropriated in Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven under:

1. Item (f), group IV, page 86, subpara-graph 28 for the City of Manila , paragraph "f", Section two, for Lamayan Basketball Court ГўВҖВ”Improvement

P2,500.00

2. Project No. B-004.7, page 256-A, Title BГўВҖВ”Highways (Feeder and Secondary Roads)ГўВҖВ”Urban, Appendix A, forГўВҖВ” Anda Street , City ofManila ГўВҖВ”Pave with asphalt, from Muralla to Sta. Lucia 640 m ............... |GR|40|10|30|....|....|....|....|ГўВҖВҰ.| 3|....|

3. Project No. B-004.8, page 256-A, Title BГўВҖВ”Highways (Feeder and Secondary Road )ГўВҖВ”Urban, Appendix A, forГўВҖВ” Sta. Lucia, City of Manila ГўВҖВ”- Paving from Victoria to Anda, 350 m. | GR|15 | 15 | 15 |ГўВҖВҰ. |ГўВҖВҰ. |ГўВҖВҰ.|ГўВҖВҰ.| ГўВҖВҰ.|....| 3 |ГўВҖВҰ.| Esti- | |mate| based| |on as-| |phalt | | pav- | | ing |

totalling twenty-seven thousand five hundred pesos, are hereby reappropriated for the following purposes:

(1) Filling of low areas in the Fourth District of Manila

P20,000.00

(2) Leroy Street from Trece de Agosto to San Gregorio Improvement

7,500.00

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
